content.json:
## StratoSecure — API Risk Inventory

Unified view of all discovered API endpoints — active, shadow, zombie, and dormant — with security risk classification.

content.query:
StratoSecure_ApiInventory_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize count() by Status
| order by count_ desc
content.title: API Status Distribution

content.query:
StratoSecure_ApiInventory_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AuthType == 'none' and InternetExposure == true
| project Path, Method, ServiceName, DataClassification, TimeGenerated
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Unauthenticated Internet-facing APIs

content.query:
StratoSecure_ApiInventory_CL
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
| where IsNew == true or DiscoverySource has 'new'
| project Path, Method, ServiceName, DiscoverySource, TimeGenerated
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: New APIs (Last 7 Days)

content.query:
StratoSecure_ApiInventory_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where DataClassification in ('PCI', 'PHI', 'PII')
| summarize count() by DataClassification, AuthType
| order by count_ desc
content.title: Sensitive Data Exposure by Auth Type
